block.header: =N(" pitopi koso pito mo mati yoki nagaki ke wo kaku nomwi mataba arikatu masizi ")

=N(" kamuyo ywori aretugikureba pito sapani kuni ni pa mitite adimura no kaywopi pa yukedo a ga kwopuru kimi ni si araneba piru pa pi no kururu made yworu pa ywo no akuru kipami omopitutu i mo negatenito akasituraku mo nagaki ko no ywo wo ")
=N(" yama no pa ni adimura sawaki yuku naredo ware pa sabusi we kimi ni si araneba ")
=N(" apumidi no tokwonoyama n aru isayagapa ke no korogoro pa kwopwitutu mo aramu ")
=N(" kimi matu to wa ga kwopwi woreba wa ga yadwo no sudare ugwokasi aki no kaze puku ")
=N(" kaze wo dani kwopuru pa tomosi kaze wo dani komu to si mataba nani ka nagekamu ")
=N(" manwonoura no yodo no tugipasi kokoro yu mo omope ya imo ga ime ni si miyuru ")
=N(" kapanope no itumo no pana no itu mo itu mo kimase wa ga sekwo tokizikyeme ya mo ")
=N(" koromode ni toritodokopori naku kwo ni mo masareru ware wo okite ikani semu ")
=N(" okite ikaba imo kwopwimu kamo sikitape no kurwokami sikite nagaki ko no ywo wo ")
=N(" wagimokwo wo apisirasimesi pito wo koso kwopwi no masareba uramyesimi omope ")
=N(" asapikage nipopyeru yama ni teru tukwi no akazaru kimi wo yamagwosi ni okite ")
=N(" mikumanwo no ura no pamayupu momopye nasu kokoro pa mopedo tadani apanu kamo ")
=N(" inisipye ni arikyemu pito mo a ga goto ka imo ni kwopwitutu inekatezukyemu ")
=N(" ima nomwi no waza ni pa arazu inisipye no pito so masarite ne ni sape nakisi ")
=N(" momopye ni mo kisikanu kamo to omope kamo kimi ga tukapi no miredo akazaramu ")
=N(" kamukazeno ise no pamawogwi woripusete tabine ya su ramu araki pamapye ni ")
=N(" wotomyera ga swode puru yama no midukaki no pisasiki toki yu omopiki ware pa ")
=N(" natunwo yuku wosika no tunwo no tuka no ma mo imo ga kokoro wo wasurete omope ya ")
=N(" tamakinu no sawisawi sidumi ipye no imo ni mono ipazu kite omopikanetu mo ")
=N(" kimi ga ipye ni wa ga sumisaka no ipyedi wo mo ware pa wasurezi inoti sinazupa ")
=N(" imasarani nani wo ka omopamu utinabiki kokoro pa kimi ni yorinisi monowo ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo pa mono na omoposi koto si araba pwi ni mo midu ni mo ware nakyenaku ni ")
=N(" sikitape no makura yu kukuru namita ni so ukine wo sikyeru kwopwi no sigeki ni ")
=N(" koromode no waku koyopi ywori imo mo ware mo itaku kwopwimu na apu yosi wo nami ")

=N(" tawayamye no kusige ni noreru kagami nasu mitu no pamapye ni saniturapu pimo tokisakezu wagimokwo ni kwopwitutu woreba akegure no asa kwirigakuri naku tadu no ne nomwi si nakayu wa ga kwopuru tipye no pitopye mo nagusamoru kokoro mo ari ya to ipye no atari wa ga tati mireba awopata no kadurakwiyama ni tanabikyeru sirakumo gakuru amasagaru pina no kunipye ni tadamukapu apadi wo sugwi apasima wo sogapi ni mitutu asanagi ni kakwo no kowe ywobi yupunagi ni kadi no to situtu nami no pe wo iyukisagukumi ipa no ma wo iyukimotopori inabituma uramwi wo sugwite torizimono nadusapiyukeba ipyenosima no ariswo no upe ni utinabiki sizini opwitaru nanoriso ga nado ka mo imo ni norazu kinikyemu ")
=N(" sirwotapeno swode tokikapete kapyerikomu tukwipi wo yomite yukite komasi wo ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo pa iduku yuku ramu okutumono nabari no yama wo kyepu ka kwoyu ramu ")
=N(" aki no ta no poda no karibaka kayoriapaba soko mo ka pito no wa wo kotonasamu ")
=N(" opopara no ko no itusiba no itu si ka to wa ga omopu imo ni koyopi apyeru kamo ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo ga kyeseru koromo no parime otizu irinikye rasi mo wa ga kokoro sape ")
=N(" pitori nete tayenisi pimo wo yuyusimito semu subye sirazu ne nomwi si zo naku ")
=N(" wa ga moteru mitu api ni yoreru ito motite tuketemasi mono ima so kuyasiki ")
=N(" kamukwi ni mo te pa puru to pu wo ututapeni pitoduma to ipeba purenu mono kamo ")
=N(" kasuganwo no yamabye no miti wo osori naku kaywopisi kimi ga miyenu koro kamo ")
=N(" amatutumi tune suru kimi pa pisakatano kizo no ywo no ame ni korinikyemu kamo ")
=N(" pisakatano ame mo puranu ka amatutumi kimi ni tagupite ko no pi kurasamu ")
=N(" nipa ni tatu asade kariposi nunwo sarasu adumawomina wo wasuretamapu na ")
=N(" wotomyera ga tamakusige n aru tamakusi no kamusabwikyemu mo imo ni apazu areba ")
=N(" yoku wataru pito pa tosi ni mo ari to pu wo itu no ma ni so mo wa ga kwopwinikyeru ")
=N(" musibusuma nagwoya ga sita ni puseredomo imo to si neneba pada si samusi mo ")
=N(" sapogapa no kwoisi pumiwatari nubatamano kurwoma no kuru ywo pa tosi ni mo aranu ka ")
=N(" tidori naku sapo no kapase no sazarenami yamu toki mo nasi wa ga kwopuraku pa ")
=N(" komu to ipu mo konu toki aru wo kozi to ipu wo komu to pa matazi kozi to ipu monowo ")
=N(" tidori naku saponokapatwo no se wo piromi utipasi watasu na ga ku to omopeba ")
=N(" sapogapa no kwisi no tukasa no siba na kari sone aritutu mo paru si kitaraba tatikakuru gane ")
=N(" akagwoma no kwoyuru umase no musubitesi imo ga kokoro pa utagapi mo nasi ")
=N(" adusayumi tumapiku ywooto no topooto ni mo kimi ga miyuki wo kikaku si yosi mo ")
=N(" utipisasu miya ni yuku kwo wo maganasimi tomureba kurusi yareba subye nasi ")
=N(" nanipagata sipopwi no nagori aku madeni pito no miru kwo wo ware si tomosi mo ")

=N(" topoduma no koko ni araneba tamapokono miti wo tadopomi omopu swora yasukyenaku ni nageku swora kurusiki monowo miswora yuku kumo ni moga mo takatobu tori ni moga mo asu yukite imo ni kotodopi a ga tameni imo mo kotonaku imo ga tame ware mo koto naku ima mo miru goto tagupite moga mo ")
=N(" sikitape no tamakura makazu apida okite tosi so penikyeru apanaku omopeba ")
=N(" ounoumi no sipopwi no kata no katamopi ni omopi ya yukamu miti no nagate wo ")
=N(" koto kiywoku itaku mo na ipi so pitopi dani kimi i si nakupa tapegataki kamo ")
=N(" pitogoto wo sigemi kotitami apazariki kokoroaru goto na omopi wa ga sekwo ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo si togemu to ipaba pitogoto pa sigeku ari tomo idete apamasi wo ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo ni mata pa apazi ka to omopeba ka kyesa no wakare no subye nakarituru ")
=N(" ko no yo ni pa pitogoto sigesi komu yo ni mo apamu wa ga sekwo ima narazu tomo ")
=N(" tune yamazu kaywopisi kimi ga tukapi kozu ima pa apazi to tayutapinu rasi ")

=N(" opokimi no miyuki no manima mononopuno yaswotomonowo to ideyukisi utukusi tuma pa amatobuya karu no miti ywori tamatasuki unebwi wo mitutu asamoyosi kwidi ni iritati matutiyama kwoyu ramu kimi pa momitiba no tiritobu mitutu mutumasimi ware pa omopazu kusamakura tabi wo yorosi to omopitutu kimi pa aramu to aswoswoni pa katu pa siredomo sikasugani moda earaneba wa ga sekwo ga yuki no manima ni opamu to pa tipye ni omopedo tawayamye no wa ga mwi ni si areba mitimori no twopamu kotape wo ipiyaramu subye wo siranito tatite tumaduku ")
=N(" okure wite kwopwitutu arazupa kwinokuni no imosenoyama ni aramasi monowo ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo ga atwo pumimotome opiyukaba kwi no sekimori i todometemu kamo ")

=N(" mikanopara tabi no yadori ni tamapokono miti no yukiapi ni amakumo no yoso nomwi mitutu kototopamu yosi no nakyereba kokoro nomwi musetutu aru ni ametuti no kamwi kotoyosete sikitape no koromode kapete onoduma to tanomyeru koyopi aki no ywo no momoywo no nagasa arikosenu kamo ")
=N(" amakumo no yoso ni misi ywori wagimokwo ni kokoro mo mwi sape yorinisi monowo ")
=N(" koyopi no payaku akenaba subye wo nami aki no momoywo wo negapituru kamo ")
=N(" ametuti no kamwi mo tasukeyo kusamakura tabi yuku kimi ga ipye ni itaru made ")
=N(" opobuneno omopitanomisi kimi ga inaba ware pa kwopwimu na tadani apu madeni ")
=N(" yamatodi no sima no uramwi ni yosuru nami apida mo nakyemu wa ga kwopwimaku pa ")
=N(" wa ga kimi pa wake woba sine to omope ka mo apu ywo apanu ywo putatu yuku ramu ")
=N(" amakumo no sokipye no kipami topokyedomo kokoro si yukeba kwopuru mono kamo ")
=N(" purupito no tamapesimetaru kibwi no sake yamaba subye nasi nukisu tabaramu ")
=N(" kimi ga tame kamisi matizake yasunonwo ni pitori ya nomamu tomo nasi nisite ")
=N(" tukusibune imada mo koneba arakazime araburu kimi wo miru ga kanasisa ")
=N(" opobune wo kogi no susumi ni ipa ni pure kapyeraba kapyere imo ni yorite pa ")
=N(" tipayaburu kamwi no yasiro ni wa ga kakesi nusa pa tabaramu imo ni apanaku ni ")
=N(" koto mo naku ikikosi monowo oinami ni kakaru kwopwi ni mo ware pa apyeru kamo ")
=N(" kwopwisinamu toki pa nani semu ikyeru pi no tame koso imo wo mimaku pori sure ")
=N(" omopanu wo omopu to ipaba oponwo n aru mikasa no mori no kamwi si sirasamu ")
=N(" itwoma naku pito no maywone wo itadurani kakasimetutu mo apanu imo kamo ")
=N(" kurwokami ni sirwokami maziri oyuru made kakaru kwopwi ni pa imada apanaku ni ")
=N(" yamasuge no mwi naranu koto wo wa ni yosori iparesi kimi pa tare to ka nu ramu ")
=N(" opotomonomitu to pa ipazi akanesasi tereru tukuywo ni tadani apyeri tomo ")
=N(" kusamakura tabi yuku kimi wo utukusimi tagupite so kosi sika no pamapye wo ")
=N(" supa ni aru ipakuniyama wo kwoyemu pi pa tamuke yoku seyo arasi so no miti ")
=N(" misakimwi no ariswo ni yosuru ipopyenami tatite mo wite mo wa ga mopyeru kimi ")
=N(" karapito no koromo simu to pu murasaki no kokoro ni simite omopoyuru kamo ")
=N(" yamatopye ni kimi ga tatu pi no tikadukeba nwo ni tatu sika mo toyomite so naku ")
=N(" tukuywo yosi kapa no oto sayakesi iza koko ni yuku mo yukanu mo aswobite yukamu ")
=N(" maswokagami miakanu kimi ni okurete ya asita yupupye ni sabwitutu woramu ")
=N(" nubatamano kurwokami kapari sirakete mo itaki kwopwi ni pa apu toki arikyeri ")
=N(" koko ni arite tukusi ya iduku sirakumo no tanabiku yama no kata ni si aru rasi ")
=N(" kusakaye no iriye ni asaru asitadu no ana tadutadusi tomo nasi nisite ")
=N(" ima ywori pa kwinoyama miti pa sabusikyemu wa ga kaywopamu to omopisi monowo ")
=N(" wa ga koromo pito ni na kise so abiki suru nanipawotokwo no te ni pa puru tomo ")
=N(" ametuti to tomoni pisasiku sumapamu to omopite arisi ipye no nipa pa mo ")
=N(" mimaturite imada toki dani kaparaneba tositukwi no goto omopoyuru kimi ")
=N(" asipikino yama ni opwitaru suganoneno nemokoro mimaku posiki kimi kamo ")
=N(" ikite araba mimaku mo sirazu nani si ka mo sinamu yo imo to ime ni miyeturu ")
=N(" masurawo mo kaku kwopwikyeru wo tawayamye no kwopuru kokoro ni tagupi arame ya mo ")
=N(" tukwikusano uturopiyasuku omope ka mo wa ga omopu pito no koto mo tugekonu ")
=N(" kasugayama asa tatu kumo no winu pi naku mimaku no posiki kimi ni mo aru kamo ")
=N(" idete inamu toki si pa aramu wo kotosarani tumagwopwi situtu tatite inu besi ya ")
=N(" apimizupa kwopwizaramasi wo imo wo mite motona kaku nomwi kwopwiba ikani semu ")
=N(" wa ga katami mitutu sinwopase aratamano tosinowo nagaku ware mo sinwopamu ")
=N(" siratorino tobayamamatu no matitutu so wa ga kwopwiwataru ko no tukwigoro wo ")
=N(" koromode wo utimwi no satwo ni aru ware wo sirani so pito pa matedo kozukyeru ")
=N(" aratamano tosi no penureba ima si pa to yume yo wa ga sekwo wa ga na norasu na ")
=N(" wa ga omopi wo pito ni sirure ya tamakusige pirakiaketu to ime ni si miyuru ")
=N(" yamwi no ywo ni naku naru tadu no yoso nomwi ni kikitutu ka aramu apu to pa nasi ni ")
=N(" kimi ni kwopwi ita mo subye nami narayama no kwomatu ga sita ni tati nageku kamo ")
=N(" wa ga yadwo no yupukagekusa no siratuyu no kenu gani motona omopoyuru kamo ")
=N(" wa ga inoti no matakyemu kagiri wasureme ya iya pinikyeni pa omopimasu tomo ")
=N(" yapoka yuku pama no managwo mo wa ga kwopwi ni ani masarazi ka oki tu simamori ")
=N(" utusemi no pitome wo sigemi ipapasino matikaki kimi ni kwopwiwataru kamo ")
=N(" kwopwi ni mo so pito pa sini suru minasegapa sita yu ware yasu tukwi ni pinikyeni ")
=N(" asagwiri no oboni apimisi pito yuweni inoti sinu beku kwopwiwataru kamo ")
=N(" isenoumi no iswo mo todoroni yosuru nami kasikwoki pito ni kwopwiwataru kamo ")
=N(" kokoro yu mo wa pa mopazariki yamakapa mo pyedataranaku ni kaku kwopwimu to pa ")
=N(" yupusareba monomopi masaru misi pito no kototopu sugata omokage nisite ")
=N(" omopu ni si sini suru mono ni aramaseba titabi so ware pa sinikapyeramasi ")
=N(" turugitati mwi ni toriswopu to ime ni mitu nani no sirusi so mo kimi ni apamu tame ")
=N(" ametuti no kamwi si kotowari nakupa koso wa ga omopu kimi ni apazu sini seme ")
=N(" ware mo omopu pito mo na wasure oponawani ura puku kaze no yamu toki mo nakare ")
=N(" mwinapito wo neyo to no kane pa utu naredo kimi wo si omopeba inekatenu kamo ")
=N(" apiomopanu pito wo omopu pa opotera no gakwi no siripye ni nukaduku ga goto ")
=N(" kokoro yu mo a pa omopazuki mata sarani wa ga purusatwo ni kapyerikomu to pa ")
=N(" tikaku areba mizu tomo arisi wo iya toponi kimi ga imasaba arikatu masizi ")
=N(" imasarani imo ni apame ya to omope kamo kokoda wa ga mune obobosikaramu ")
=N(" nakanakani moda mo aramasi wo nani su to ka apimisomekyemu togezaramaku ni ")
=N(" monoomopu to pito ni miyezi to namazipwini tune no omopyeri ari so kaneturu ")
=N(" apiomopanu pito wo ya motona sirwotapeno swode pitu madeni ne nomwi si naku mo ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo pa apiomopazu tomo sikitape no kimi ga makura pa ime ni miyekoso ")
=N(" turugitati na no wosikyeku mo ware pa nasi kimi ni apazute tosi no penureba ")
=N(" asipye ywori mitikuru sipo no iya masini omope ka kimi ga wasurekaneturu ")
=N(" saywonaka ni tomo ywobu tidori monomopu to wabwi woru toki ni nakitutu motona ")

=N(" ositeru nanipa no suge no nemokoroni kimi ga kikosite tosi pukaku nagaku si ipeba maswokagami twogisi kokoro wo yurusitesi so no pi no kipami nami no muta nabiku tamamo no ka ni kaku ni kokoro pa motazu opobuneno tanomyeru toki ni tipayaburu kamwi ya sakekyemu utusemi no pito ka sapu ramu kaywopasisi kimi mo kimasazu tamadusano tukapi mo miyezu narinureba ita mo subye nami nubatamano yworu pa sugarani akarapiku pi mo kururu made nagekedomo sirusi wo nami omopedomo taduki wo sirani tawayamye to ipaku mo siruku tawarapa no ne nomwi nakitutu tamotopori kimi ga tukapi wo mati ya kanetemu ")
=N(" pazime ywori nagaku ipitutu tanomezupa kakaru omopi ni apamasi monoka ")
=N(" apida naku kwopure ni ka aramu kusamakura tabi n aru kimi ga ime ni si miyuru ")
=N(" kusamakura tabi ni pisasiku narinureba na wo koso omope na kwopwi so wagimo ")
=N(" matu no pa ni tukwi pa yuturinu momitiba no sugure ya kimi ga apanu ywo no opoki ")
=N(" miti ni apite wemasisi karani puruyukino kenaba kenu gani kwopu to pu wagimo ")
=N(" okipye yuki pye ni yuki ima ya imo ga tame wa ga sunadoreru mopusitukapuna ")
=N(" kimi ni yori koto no sigeki wo purusatwo no asukanokapa ni misogi si ni yuku ")
=N(" kimi ni yori koto no sigeki wo tatuta kwoye mitu no pamapye ni misogi si ni yuku ")
=N(" wa ga tamoto makamu to omopamu masurawo pa wotimidu motome siraka opwinitari ")
=N(" siraka opuru koto pa omopazu wotimidu pa ka ni mo kaku ni mo motomete yukamu ")
=N(" nani su to ka tukapi no kituru kimi wo koso ka ni mo kaku ni mo matigateni sure ")
=N(" patupana no tiru beki monowo pitogoto no sigeki ni yorite yodomu koro kamo ")
=N(" upapye naki mono kamo pito pa sika bakari topoki ipyedi wo kapyesaku omopeba ")
=N(" me ni pa mite te ni pa torayenu tukwi no uti no katura no gotoki imo wo ikani semu ")
=N(" kokodaku ni omopikyeme ka mo sikitapeno makura katasaru ime ni miyekyeru ")
=N(" ipye ni site miredo akanu wo kusamakura tabi ni mo tuma to aru ga tomosisa ")
=N(" kusamakura tabi ni pa tuma pa witaredomo kusige no uti no tama wo koso omope ")
=N(" wa ga koromo katami ni maturu sikitape no makura wo sakezu makite sanemase ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo ga katami no koromo tumadopi ni wa ga mwi pa sakezi kototopazu tomo ")
=N(" tada pitoywo pyedatesi karani aratamano tukwi ka penuru to kokoro pa matwopu ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo ga kaku kwopure koso nubatamano ime ni miyetutu inerayezukyere ")
=N(" pasikyeyasi ma tikaki satwo wo kumowi ni ya kwopwitutu woramu tukwi mo penaku ni ")
=N(" tatu to ipaba wabwisimi semu to yakitatino pyetukapu koto pa sakiku ya wa ga kimi ")
=N(" wagimokwo ni kwopwite midareba kurubyeki ni kakete yosemu to wa ga kwopwisomesi ")
=N(" yo no naka no womina ni si araba wa ga wataru anase no kapa wo watarikaneme ya ")
=N(" ima pa wa pa wabwi so sinikyeru iki no wo ni omopisi kimi wo yurusaku mopeba ")
=N(" sirwotapeno swode wakaru beki pi wo tikami kokoro ni musepi ne nomwi si nakayu ")
=N(" masurawo no omopiwabwitutu tabimaneku nageku nageki wo opanu mono kamo ")
=N(" kokoro ni pa wasururu pi naku omopedomo pito no koto koso sigeki kimi ni are ")
=N(" apimizute ke nagaku narinu ko no koro pa ikani sakiku ya ipukasi wagimo ")
=N(" natukuzuno tayenu tukapi no yodomyereba koto si mo aru goto omopituru kamo ")
=N(" wagimokwo pa tokoyo no kuni ni sumikye rasi mukasi misi ywori wotimasinikyeri ")
=N(" pisakatano ama no tuyusimo okinikyeri ipye n aru pito mo matikwopwinu ramu ")
=N(" tamamori ni tama pa sadukete katugatu mo makura to ware pa iza putari nemu ")
=N(" kokoro ni pa wasurenu monowo tamasakani minu pi samaneku tukwi so penikyeru ")
=N(" apimite pa tukwi mo penaku ni kwopu to ipaba wosoro to ware wo omoposamu kamo ")
=N(" omopanu wo omopu to ipaba ametuti no kamwi mo sirasamu opo re sa kapyeru ")
=N(" ware nomwi so kimi ni pa kwopuru wa ga sekwo ga kwopu to pu koto pa koto no nagusa so ")
=N(" omopazi to ipitesi monowo panezuirono uturopiyasuki wa ga kokoro kamo ")
=N(" omopu tomo sirusi mo nasi to siru monowo nani si ka kokoda wa ga kwopwiwataru ")
=N(" arakazime pitogoto sigesi kaku si araba siweya wa ga sekwo oku mo ikani arame ")
=N(" na wo to a wo pito so saku naru ide wa ga kimi pito no nakagoto kikikosu na yume ")
=N(" kwopwikwopwite apyeru toki dani utukusiki koto tukusiteyo nagaku to omopaba ")
=N(" agwo no yama ipopye kakuseru sate no saki sade papesi kwo ga ime ni si miyuru ")
=N(" sapo watari wagapye no upe ni naku tori no kowe natukasiki pasiki tuma no kwo ")
=N(" iswonokami puru tomo ame ni saparame ya imo ni apamu to ipitesi monowo ")
=N(" mukapiwite miredomo akanu wagimokwo ni tatiwakare yukamu taduki sirazu mo ")
=N(" apiminu pa ikupisasa ni mo aranaku ni kokodaku ware pa kwopwitutu mo aru ka ")
=N(" kwopwikwopwite apitaru monowo tukwi si areba ywo pa komoru ramu simasi pa arimate ")
=N(" asa ni ke ni iroduku yama no sirakumo no omopisugu beki kimi ni aranaku ni ")
=N(" asipikino yamatatibana no iro ni ideyo katarapitugite apu koto mo aramu ")
=N(" tukuyomi no pikari ni kimase asipikino yama kipyenarite topokaranaku ni ")
=N(" tukuyomi no pikari pa kiywoku teraseredo matwopu kokoro ni omopiapenaku ni ")
=N(" situtamaki kazu ni mo aranu inoti moti nani si ka kokodaku wa ga kwopwiwataru ")
=N(" maswokagami twogisi kokoro wo yurusiteba noti ni ipu tomo sirusi arame ya mo ")
=N(" matamatuku wotikoti kanete koto pa ipedo apite noti koso kui ni pa ari to ipe ")
=N(" wominapyesi sakisapa ni opuru panakatumi katute mo siranu kwopwi mo suru kamo ")
=N(" wata no soko oki wo pukamete wa ga omopyeru kimi ni pa apamu tosi pa penu tomo ")
=N(" kasugayama asa wiru kumo no opoposiku siranu pito ni mo kwopuru mono kamo ")
=N(" tadani apite miteba nomwi koso tamakiparu inoti ni mukapu wa ga kwopwiyamame ")
=N(" ina to ipaba sipwime ya wa ga se suganoneno omopimidarete kwopwitutu mo aramu ")
=N(" kedasiku mo pito no nakagoto kikose ka mo kokodaku matedo kimi ga kimasanu ")
=N(" nakanakani tatu to si ipaba kaku bakari iki no wo nisite ware kwopwime ya mo ")
=N(" omopu ramu pito ni aranaku ni nemokoroni kokorotukusite kwopuru ware kamo ")
=N(" ipu koto no kasikwoki kuni zo kurenawi no iro ni na ide so omopisinu tomo ")
=N(" ima pa a pa sinamu yo wa ga se ikyeri tomo ware ni yoru besi to ipu to ipanaku ni ")
=N(" pitogoto wo sigemi ka kimi ga putasayano ipye wo pyedatete kwopwitutu woramu ")
=N(" ko no koro pa titose ya yuki mo sugwinuru to ware ya sika mopu mimaku pore kamo ")
=N(" urupasi to wa ga mopu kokoro payakapa no seki ni seku tomo napo ya kuyenamu ")
=N(" awoyama wo yokogiru kumo no itisirwoku ware to wemasite pito ni sirayu na ")
=N(" umi yama mo pyedataranaku ni nani si ka mo mekoto wo dani mo kokoda tomosiki ")
=N(" terasu pi wo yamwi ni minasite naku namita koromo nurasitu posu pito nasi ni ")
=N(" momosikwino opomiyapito pa opokaredo kokoro ni norite omopoyuru imo ")
=N(" upapye naki imo ni mo aru kamo kaku bakari pito no kokoro wo tukusaku omopeba ")
=N(" kaku nomwi si kwopwi ya wataramu akidunwo ni tanabiku kumo no sugu to pa nasi ni ")
=N(" kwopwikusa wo tikaraguruma ni nanakuruma tumite kwopuraku wa ga kokorokara ")
=N(" kwopwi pa ima pa arazi to ware pa omopyeru wo iduku no kwopwi so tukami kakareru ")
=N(" ipyebito ni kwopwisugwime ya mo kapadu naku iduminosatwo ni tosi no penureba ")
=N(" wa ga kiki ni kakete na ipi so karikomono midarete omopu kimi ga tadaka so ")
=N(" kasuganwo ni asa wiru kumo no sikusikuni a pa kwopwimasaru tukwi ni pinikyeni ")
=N(" pitose ni pa titabi saparapi yuku midu no noti ni mo apamu ima narazu tomo ")
=N(" kaku site ya napo ya makaramu tikakaranu miti no apida wo nadumimawikite ")
=N(" patupatuni pito wo apimite ikanaramu idure no pi ni ka mata yoso ni mimu ")
=N(" nubatamano so no ywo no tukuywo kyepu madeni ware pa wasurezu manaku si mopeba ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo wo apimisi so no pi kyepu madeni wa ga koromode pa puru toki mo nasi ")
=N(" takunapano nagaki inoti wo porisiku pa tayezute pito wo mimaku pore koso ")
=N(" panekadura ima suru imo wo ime ni mite kokoro no uti ni kwopwiwataru kamo ")
=N(" panekadura ima suru imo pa nakarisi wo idure no imo so sokoba kwopwitaru ")
=N(" omopiyaru subye no siraneba katamopi no soko ni so ware pa kwopwinarinikyeru ")
=N(" mata mo apamu yosi mo aranu ka sirwotapeno wa ga koromode ni ipapi todomemu ")
=N(" yupuyamwi pa miti tadutadusi tukwi matite yukase wa ga sekwo so no ma ni mo mimu ")
=N(" miswora yuku tukwi no pikari ni tada pitome apimisi pito no ime ni si miyuru ")
=N(" kamotori no aswobu ko no ike ni konopa otite ukabyeru kokoro wa ga omopanaku ni ")
=N(" umasakewo miwa no papuri ga ipapu sugwi te puresi tumi ka kimi ni apigataki ")
=N(" kakipo nasu pitogoto kikite wa ga sekwo ga kokoro tayutapi apanu ko no koro ")
=N(" kokoro ni pa omopiwataredo yosi wo nami yoso nomwi nisite nageki so wa ga suru ")
=N(" tidori naku saponokapatwo no kiywoki se wo uma utiwatasi itu ka kaywopamu ")
=N(" yworu piru to ipu waki sirazu wa ga kwopuru kokoro pa kedasi ime ni miyeki ya ")
=N(" ture mo naku aru ramu pito wo katamopi ni ware pa omopeba wabwisiku mo aru ka ")
=N(" omopanu ni imo ga wemapi wo ime ni mite kokoro no uti ni moyetutu so woru ")
=N(" masurawo to omopyeru ware wo kaku bakari miture ni miture katamopi wo semu ")
=N(" murakimono kokoro kudakete kaku bakari wa ga kwopuraku wo sirazu ka aru ramu ")
=N(" asipikino yama ni si woreba miyabwi nami wa ga suru waza wo togametamapu na ")
=N(" kaku bakari kwopwitutu arazupa ipakwi ni mo naramasi monowo monomopazusite ")

=N(" tokoyo ni to wa ga yukanaku ni wokanatwo ni monokanasirani omopyerisi wa ga kwo no twozi wo nubatamano yworu piru to ipazu omopu ni si wa ga mwi pa yasenu nageku ni si swode sape nurenu kaku bakari motona si kwopwiba purusatwo ni ko no tukwigoro mo arikatu masizi ")
=N(" asakami no omopimidarete kaku bakari nane ga kwopure so ime ni miyekyeru ")
=N(" nipodori no kaduku ikemidu kokoroaraba kimi ni wa ga kwopuru kokoro simyesane ")
=N(" yoso ni wite kwopwitutu arazupa kimi ga ipye no ike ni sumu to ipu kamo ni aramasi wo ")
=N(" wasuregusa wa ga sitapimo ni tuketaredo sikono sikokusa koto ni si arikyeri ")
=N(" pito mo naki kuni mo aranu ka wagimokwo to tadusapariyukite tagupite woramu ")
=N(" tama naraba te ni mo makamu wo utusemi no yo no pito nareba te ni makigatasi ")
=N(" apamu ywo pa itu mo aramu wo nani su to ka ka no yopi apite koto no sigeki mo ")
=N(" wa ga na pa mo tina no ipona ni tatinu tomo kimi ga na tataba wosimi koso nake ")
=N(" ima si pa si na no wosikyeku mo ware pa nasi imo ni yorite pa titabi tatu tomo ")
=N(" utusemi no yo ya mo putayuku nani su to ka imo ni apazute wa ga pitori nemu ")
=N(" wa ga omopi kakute arazupa tama ni moga makoto mo imo ga te ni makaremu wo ")
=N(" kasugayama kasumi tanabiki kokoroguku tereru tukuywo ni pitori ka mo nemu ")
=N(" tukuywo ni pa kadwo ni idetati yupuke twopi aura wo so sesi yukamaku wo pori ")
=N(" ka ni kaku ni pito pa ipu tomo wakasadi no notisenoyama no noti mo apamu kimi ")
=N(" yononaka no kurusiki mono ni arikyeraku kwopwi ni apezute sinu beku omopeba ")
=N(" notiseyama noti mo apamu to omope koso sinu beki monowo kyepu made mo ikyere ")
=N(" koto nomwi wo noti mo apamu to nemokoroni ware wo tanomete apazaramu kamo ")
=N(" ime no api pa kurusikarikyeri odorokite kakisaguredomo te ni mo pureneba ")
=N(" pitopye nomwi imo ga musubamu obi wo sura mipye musubu beku wa ga mwi pa narinu ")
=N(" wa ga kwopwi pa tibiki no isi wo nana bakari kubi ni kakemu mo kamwi no manima ni ")
=N(" yupusaraba yadwo akemakete ware matamu ime ni apimi ni komu to pu pito wo ")
=N(" asayopi ni mimu toki sape ya wagimokwo ga mi tomo minu goto napo kwoposikyemu ")
=N(" ikyeru yo ni a pa imada mizu koto tayete kaku omosirwoku nupyeru pukurwo pa ")
=N(" wagimokwo ga katami no koromo sita ni kite tadani apu made pa ware nukame ya mo ")
=N(" kwopwisinamu soko mo onazi so nani semu ni pitome pitogoto kotitami wa ga semu ")
=N(" ime ni dani miyeba koso arame kaku bakari miyezu si aru pa kwopwite sine to ka ")
=N(" omopitaye wabwinisi monowo nakanakani nani ka kurusiku apimisomekyemu ")
=N(" apimite pa ikuka mo penu wo kokodaku mo kurupi ni kurupi omopoyuru kamo ")
=N(" kaku bakari omokage ni nomwi omopoyeba ikani ka mo semu pitome sigekute ")
=N(" apimiteba simasiku kwopwi pa nagwimu ka to omopedo iyoyo kwopwimasarikyeri ")
=N(" ywo no podoro wa ga idete kureba wagimokwo ga omopyerisiku si omokage ni miyu ")
=N(" ywo no podoro idetutu kuraku tabimaneku nareba wa ga mune tatiyaku gotosi ")
=N(" yoso ni wite kwopureba kurusi wagimokwo wo tugite apimimu kotopakari seyo ")
=N(" topoku araba wabwite mo aramu wo satwo tikaku ari to kikitutu minu ga subyenasa ")
=N(" sirakumo no tanabiku yama no takatakani wa ga omopu imo wo mimu yosi moga mo ")
=N(" ikanaramu toki ni ka imo wo mugurapu no kitanaki yadwo ni iriimasetemu ")
=N(" utiwatasu taketa no para ni naku tadu no manaku toki nasi wa ga kwopuraku pa ")
=N(" payakapa no se ni wiru tori no yosi wo nami omopite arisi wa ga kwo pa mo apare ")
=N(" kamusabu to inabu ni pa arane pata ya pata kaku site noti ni sabusikyemu kamo ")
=N(" tama no wo wo awawo ni yorite musubyeraba arite noti ni mo apazarame ya mo ")
=N(" momotose ni oisita idete yoyomu tomo ware pa itopazi kwopwi pa masu tomo ")
=N(" pitopye yama pyenareru monowo tukuywo yomi kadwo ni idetati imo ka matu ramu ")
=N(" miti topomi kozi to pa sireru monokarani sika so matu ramu kimi ga me wo pori ")
=N(" miyakwodi wo topomi ka imo ga ko no koro pa ukepite nuredo ime ni miyekonu ")
=N(" ima sirasu kuninomiyakwo ni imo ni apazu pisasiku narinu yukite paya mina ")
=N(" pisakatano ame no puru pi wo tada pitori yamapye ni woreba ibusekarikyeri ")
=N(" pitome opomi apanaku nomwi so kokoro sape imo wo wasurete wa ga mopanaku ni ")
=N(" itupari mo nitukite so suru utusiku mo makoto wagimokwo ware ni kwopwime ya ")
=N(" ime ni dani miyemu to ware pa podokedomo api si mopaneba ube miyezaramu ")
=N(" kototopanu kwi sura adisawi morotira ga neri no muratwo ni azamukayekyeri ")
=N(" momotitabi kwopu to ipu tomo morotira ga neri no kotoba pa ware pa tanomazi ")
=N(" uduranaku purinisi satwo yu omopedomo nani so mo imo ni apu yosi mo naki ")
=N(" kotodesi pa ta ga koto naru ka woyamada no napasiromidu no nakayodo nisite ")
=N(" wagimokwo ga yadwo no magaki wo mi ni yukaba kedasi kadwo ywori kapyesitemu kamo ")
=N(" ututapeni magaki no sugata mimaku pori yukamu to ipe ya kimi wo mi ni koso ")
=N(" itapuki no kurwokwi no yane pa yama tikasi asu no pi torite motimawirikomu ")
=N(" kurwokwi tori kaya mo karitutu tukapemedo isosiki wake to pomemu to mo arazu ")
=N(" kurwokwi tori kaya mo karitutu tukapemedo isosiki wake to tukapu to mo arazu ")
=N(" nubatamano kizo pa kapyesitu ko yopi sape ware wo kapyesu na miti no nagate wo ")
=N(" kaze takaku pye ni pa pukedomo imo ga tame swode sape nurete kareru tamamo so ")
=N(" wototosi no sakitutosi ywori kotosi made kwopuredo na zo mo imo ni apigataki ")
=N(" ututu ni pa mata mo eipazi ime ni dani imo ga tamoto wo maki nu to si miba ")
=N(" wa ga yadwo no kusa no upe sirwoku oku tuyu no mwi mo wosikarazu imo ni apazaraba ")
=N(" paru no ame pa iya sikipuru ni ume no pana imada sakanaku ito wakami kamo ")
=N(" ime no goto omopoyuru kamo pasikiyasi kimi ga tukapi no maneku kaywopeba ")
=N(" ura wakami pana sakikataki ume wo uwete pito no koto sigemi omopi so wa ga suru ")
=N(" kokoroguku omopoyuru kamo parukasumi tanabiku toki ni koto no kaywopeba ")
=N(" parukaze no oto ni s idenaba arisarite ima narazu tomo kimi ga manima ni ")
=N(" okuyama no ipakage ni opuru suganoneno nemokoro ware mo apimopazare ya ")
=N(" parusame wo matu to ni si a rasi wa ga yadwo no wakakwi no ume mo imada pupumyeri ")
